hero.title: Turn your apps into
hero.description: AppGrid is the marketplace where developers publish SaaS, scripts and automations. We handle the part you hate: packaging, positioning and selling.

howWorks.title: How it works
howWorks.subtitle: In three steps your app generates income.
howWorks.step1Desc: Upload your SaaS, script or automation from the admin panel. Price, description, category — done.
howWorks.step2Desc: Your app appears in the marketplace in front of developers and companies from LATAM and Spain looking for solutions.
howWorks.step3Desc: The buyer pays through your MercadoPago link. You get the money and give them access. No intermediaries.

features.title: Why AppGrid
features.subtitle: Everything you need to monetize your code.
features.feature1Desc: No payment servers or landing pages to configure. Publish and start selling.
features.feature2Desc: Access millions of developers and companies in Spain, Argentina, Mexico, Colombia and more.
features.feature3Desc: One-time price, monthly subscription, or whatever works best for your product. No restrictions.

roadmap.title: What's coming
roadmap.subtitle: AppGrid is growing. Here's what we're building.
roadmap.item1Desc: Tools to get your app to exactly the audience that needs it.
roadmap.item2Desc: How many visits, where they come from, what converts. All in one dashboard.
roadmap.item3Desc: Process payments directly from AppGrid, without leaving the platform.

finalCta.title: Got an app ready?
finalCta.subtitle: Publish it today. It's free and takes less than 5 minutes.

marketplace.title: Find the perfect
marketplace.noAppsCategoryDesc: Be the first to publish your app.

auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.
